member.summary: Initial working directory for sessions.

member.summary: Send a JSON-RPC request and wait for the response.

member.summary: Send a JSON-RPC notification (no response expected).

member.summary: Remove a previously registered notification handler.

member.summary: Register a handler for a server-initiated notification method.

member.summary: Shut down the transport, cancelling any pending reads.

member.name: T:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.JsonRpcTransport
member.summary: Low-level JSON-RPC transport over streams with Content-Length framing.

member.summary: Exception raised when a JSON-RPC error response is received.

member.summary: A JSON-RPC 2.0 notification (no id, no response expected).

member.summary: A JSON-RPC 2.0 error object.

member.summary: A JSON-RPC 2.0 response envelope.

member.name: T:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.JsonRpcRequest
member.summary: A JSON-RPC 2.0 request envelope.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.WorkspacePath
member.summary: The workspace path if infinite sessions are enabled.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.SessionId
member.summary: The unique identifier for this session.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.Events
member.summary: Subscribe to session events via an IObservable.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.StopAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Stop the session (notifies the server).

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.SendAsync(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.MessageOptions,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Send a message to the session. Returns the response message ID.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.SendAndWaitAsync(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.MessageOptions,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.TimeSpan},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Send a message and wait until the session becomes idle. Returns the final assistant message, or None if no message was received.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.RegisterTools(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.RegisteredTool})
member.summary: Register multiple tools at once.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.RegisterTool(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.RegisteredTool)
member.summary: Register a tool that the assistant can invoke during this session.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.On(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEvent,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit})
member.summary:
Subscribe to all session events. Returns an IDisposable that removes the handler when disposed.
Use pattern matching in F# to handle events idiomatically: session.On(function | AssistantMessage data -> printfn "%s" data.Content | SessionIdle -> printfn "Done" | _ -> ())

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.GetHistoryAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Retrieve the conversation history for this session.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession.#ctor(System.String,CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.JsonRpcTransport)
member.summary: Alternate constructor without workspace path.

member.name: T:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotSession
member.summary:
A Copilot conversation session.
Sessions are created via CopilotClient.createSession or resumed via CopilotClient.resumeSession. They manage event subscriptions, tool registration, and message exchange with the assistant.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.NegotiatedProtocolVersion
member.summary: Negotiated protocol version with the server.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.ConnectionState
member.summary: Current connection state.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.ActualPort
member.summary: Actual TCP port when not using stdio.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.StopAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Stop the client, killing the CLI process if one was spawned.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.StartAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Start the client, spawning the CLI process or connecting to an existing server.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.SetForegroundSessionIdAsync(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Set the foreground session ID.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.ResumeSessionAsync(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.ResumeSessionConfig,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Resume an existing session by ID.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.PingAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.String},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Ping the server to verify connectivity.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.ListSessionsAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: List all sessions known to the server.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.ListModelsAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: List available models.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.GetStatusAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Get the server status.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.GetSessionMetadataAsync(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Get metadata for a session.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.GetLastSessionIdAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Get the ID of the most recently updated session.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.GetForegroundSessionIdAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Get the foreground session ID.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.GetAuthStatusAsync(Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Get the authentication status.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.DeleteSessionAsync(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Delete a session permanently.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.CreateSessionAsync(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionConfig,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Create a new conversation session.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient.#ctor
member.summary: Create a client with default options.

member.name: T:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient
member.summary:
Main client for interacting with the GitHub Copilot CLI.
CopilotClient manages the connection to the Copilot CLI server and provides methods to create and manage conversation sessions. It can either spawn a CLI server process or connect to an existing server.
Example: async { use client = CopilotClient.create CopilotClientOptions.defaults do! client.StartAsync() let! session = client.CreateSessionAsync(SessionConfig.defaults) let! reply = session.SendAndWaitAsync({ Prompt = "Hello!"; Attachments = None; Mode = None }) reply |> Option.iter (fun data -> printfn "%s" data.Content) do! client.StopAsync() } |> Async.RunSynchronously

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SdkProtocolVersion.getVersion
member.summary: Gets the SDK protocol version.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SdkProtocolVersion.Version
member.summary: The SDK protocol version.

member.name: T:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SdkProtocolVersion
member.summary: Provides the SDK protocol version. This must match the version expected by the copilot-agent-runtime server.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEventModule.parse(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Text.Json.JsonElement})
member.summary: Parse a wire event type string and raw JSON into a SessionEvent.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEventModule.isIdle(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEvent)
member.summary: Check whether this event signals session idle.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEventModule.tryGetDeltaContent(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEvent)
member.summary: Try to extract delta content for streaming.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEventModule.tryGetMessageContent(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionEvent)
member.summary: Try to extract the assistant message content from an event.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.ToolResultObjectModule.failure(System.String)
member.summary: Create a failure result with an error message.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.ToolResultObjectModule.success(System.String)
member.summary: Create a successful text result.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionConfigModule.defaults
member.summary: Default session config with approveAll handler.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionConfigModule.rejectAll(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.PermissionRequest)
member.summary: Reject all permission requests.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.SessionConfigModule.approveAll(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.PermissionRequest)
member.summary: Approve all permission requests automatically.

member.name: P:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClientOptionsModule.defaults
member.summary: Default client options (stdio, auto-start, info log level).

member.name: T:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.DefineTool.ToolBuilder
member.summary: Pipe-friendly tool builder: start with a name and description, then compose using |> withParameters |> withHandler.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.DefineTool.createSimple(System.String,System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{Microsoft.FSharp.Core.Unit,Microsoft.FSharp.Control.FSharpAsync{System.String}})
member.summary: Create a simple tool with no parameters.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.DefineTool.createTyped``2(System.String,System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Text.Json.JsonElement},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,Microsoft.FSharp.Control.FSharpAsync{``1}})
member.summary: Create a RegisteredTool using a typed argument extractor. The extractor deserializes the arguments JSON element into a typed value, and the handler receives that typed value.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.DefineTool.create(System.String,System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpOption{System.Text.Json.JsonElement},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.ToolInvocation,Microsoft.FSharp.Control.FSharpAsync{System.Object}})
member.summary: Create a RegisteredTool from a name, description, optional JSON schema, and handler.

member.name: T:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.DefineTool
member.summary:
Helper module for defining tools with F# idioms.
Example: let weatherTool = DefineTool.create "get_weather" "Get current weather for a city" (Some parameterSchema) (fun invocation -> async { let city = invocation.Arguments |> Option.bind (fun a -> match a.TryGetProperty("city") with | true, c -> Some (c.GetString()) | _ -> None) |> Option.defaultValue "Unknown" return ToolResultObject.success (sprintf "Weather in %s: Sunny, 72F" city) :> obj })

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClientModule.stop(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient)
member.summary: Stop the client asynchronously.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClientModule.start(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClient)
member.summary: Start the client asynchronously.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClientModule.createDefault
member.summary: Create a CopilotClient with default options.

member.name: M:CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClientModule.create(CopilotSDK.Supercharged.FSharp.CopilotClientOptions)
member.summary: Create a CopilotClient with the given options.
